item.text: {"case_id":"EXB-D1","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant explicitly refuses a fourth `!important` override in the first sentence, identifies the repeated overrides as a structural layout responsibility problem rather than a one-off specificity fight, and offers upstream parent/container layout fixes with CSS examples. It allows only a clearly temporary override for hard-to-change third-party/inline cases with a deletion condition, so the structural repair remains the main path."}
